reviews.comment:
El lugar está muy presentable y cuidado.
Nos pasaron 2 cosas...
Cuando les pedí que me limpiaran el vidrio y si podían repasar los faroles delanteros,  me dijeron que SOLO EL VIDRIO porque el dueño de la estación dice que para lavar el auto están los lavaderos.  Interesante respuesta, no?
A mi esposa,  mientras tanto, le dijeron en el Shop que si quería el café PARA LLEVAR, la promo no era válida!
El resto,  ok. Esos detalles me llamaron la atención.

(Translated by Google)
The place is very presentable and well-maintained.
Two things happened to us...
When I asked them to clean my windshield and if they could touch up the headlights, they told me ONLY THE WINDSHIELD because the station owner says that for washing cars there are car washes. Interesting answer, right?
Meanwhile, my wife was told at the convenience store that if she wanted coffee TO GO, the promotion wasn't valid!
The rest was fine. Those details caught my attention.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8700140572418264453/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSMGYzRVN3EAE

reviews.comment:
Separemos.....como serviconpras 1 estrella muy caros los productos casi el doble de cualquier comercio serca, no les compro más,  ahora.....como estación expendedora de combustible le doy 4 estrellas.....pienso que sería bueno una actualización, están iguales hace muchos años.

(Translated by Google)
Let's separate them.....as a convenience store, 1 star, very expensive products, almost double the price of any nearby store, I won't buy from them again. Now.....as a gas station, I give it 4 stars.....I think an update would be good, they've been the same for many years.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8700140572418264453/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSdzkzeEZREAE
